events.agenda: Inaugural Copenhagen dbt Meetup covering Dagbladet Børsen's simplification journey, LEGO Group's shift to decentralized data product ownership, and hands-on testing techniques with GitHub Actions CI.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Feb 22, 2023 · 5:00 PM to 7:30 PM CET

Møntergade 19, Copenhagen

Copenhagen dbt Meetup

17:30: How Dagbladet Børsen went from complex to simple (Anders Boje Hertz, Intellishore)
18:00: LEGO Group - a centralized data architecture to decentralized data product ownership (Valeri Voev, Principal Data Engineer at LEGO Group)
18:30: Multiple Solutions, Multiple Setups, Multiple Wins! - A Hands-on Look at Testing Techniques (Lisa-Marie Ebel, Analytics Engineering Lead at TooGoodToGo)

talks.description: How Dagbladet Børsen simplified a complex data setup.

talks.title: How Dagbladet Børsen went from complex to simple

talks.description: LEGO Group's transition from a centralized data architecture to decentralized data product ownership across business domains.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 18:00: LEGO Group - a centralized data architecture to decentralized data product ownership (Valeri Voev, Principal Data Engineer at the LEGO Group)
talks.title: LEGO Group - a centralized data architecture to decentralized data product ownership

talks.description: A hands-on look at testing techniques at TooGoodToGo, focusing on GitHub Actions and their fine-tuned CI flow.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 18:30: Multiple Solutions, Multiple Setups, Multiple Wins! - A Hands-on Look at Testing Techniques (Lisa-Marie Ebel, Analytics Engineering Lead at TooGoodToGo)
talks.title: Multiple Solutions, Multiple Setups, Multiple Wins! - A Hands-on Look at Testing Techniques

events.agenda: Second edition covering building reliable data platforms with a robust testing strategy, rolling out dbt at scale at Pleo, and migrating to dbt and Snowflake at Lederne.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Sep 28, 2023 · 5:30 PM to 8:45 PM CEST

Lederne, Vermlandsgade 65, Copenhagen

Copenhagen dbt Meetup vol. 2

Petr Janda, Co-Founder & CEO at Synq - Building Reliable Data Platforms.

Mia Nørgaard Fugl, Senior Analytics Engineer at Pleo - How we decided to build a new dbt data modeling repository and why we didn't want to fix our old one.

Henrik Varmer, Head of Data & Analytics at Lederne - Migration to dbt and Snowflake: Lessons learned and technical walkthrough.

talks.description: A robust testing strategy for preventing errors in data platforms, inspired by lessons from dozens of dbt and data warehouse deployments.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Petr Janda, Co-Founder & CEO at the Synq - Building Reliable Data Platforms
talks.title: Building Reliable Data Platforms

talks.description: Pleo's decision to build a new dbt data modeling repository from scratch rather than fixing the old one, and lessons learned rolling out dbt at scale.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Mia Nørgaard Fugl, Senior Analytics Engineer at Pleo - How we decided to build a new dbt data modeling repository and why we didn't want to fix our old one
talks.title: How we decided to build a new dbt data modeling repository and why we didn't want to fix our old one

talks.description: Lederne's migration to Snowflake and dbt, covering business and cost considerations and a technical walkthrough of migrating complex data and business logic.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Migration to dbt and Snowflake: Lessons learned and technical walkthrough by Henrik Varmer, Head of Data & Analytics at Lederne
talks.title: Migration to dbt and Snowflake: Lessons learned and technical walkthrough

events.agenda: Third edition covering data activation with dbt and Reverse ETL at Lundbeck, redefining a data stack at Veo, and the dbt mesh paradigm.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Jan 17, 2024 · 5:30 PM to 8:45 PM CET

Veo Technologies, Rovsingsgade 68, Copenhagen

Copenhagen dbt Meetup vol. 3

William Frisch Møller, Senior Data Engineer at Lundbeck - How to Use dbt and Reverse ETL to Power Your Data Activation.

Magnus Enk, Head of BI at Veo Technologies & Bjarke Wheatley Enkelund, Analytics Engineer at Veo Technologies - "Init" to win it.

Kshitij Aranke, Senior Software Engineer at dbt Labs - dbt mesh from beginner to advanced.

talks.description: How Lundbeck uses dbt to transform data and Hightouch (Reverse ETL) to sync it with operational systems, powering personalized sales suggestions.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: How to Use dbt and Reverse ETL to Power Your Data Activation by William Frisch Møller, Senior Data Engineer at Lundbeck
talks.title: How to Use dbt and Reverse ETL to Power Your Data Activation

talks.description: How Veo implemented dbt to address a pressing challenge, gradually redefining their data stack and applying engineering principles.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: "Init" to win it by Magnus Enk, Head of BI at Veo Technologies & Bjarke Wheatley Enkelund, Analytics Engineer at Veo Technologies
talks.speaker_title: Head of BI & Analytics Engineer, Veo Technologies
talks.title: "Init" to win it

talks.description: The dbt mesh paradigm unveiled at Coalesce, covering beginner (model contracts/versioning), intermediate (governance with groups/access), and advanced (cross-project references, dbt-meshify) steps.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: dbt mesh from beginner to advanced by Kshitij Aranke, Senior Software Engineer at dbt Labs
talks.title: dbt mesh from beginner to advanced

events.agenda: Fourth edition covering Lunar's dbt Core journey on AWS, a math-driven approach to dbt collaboration at Mrs Wordsmith, and ZeroNorth's dbt Core infrastructure.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Wed, May 15, 2024 · 5:30 PM to 8:45 PM CEST

Lunar, Bredgade 43, Copenhagen

Copenhagen dbt Meetup vol. 4

Mikael Hedegaard Thorup, Senior Analytics Engineer at Lunar - Working with dbt Core on the AWS stack.

Charles T. Grey, Data Scientist at Mrs Wordsmith - Implementing dbt and developing collaborative workflows, a math nerd's perspective.

Stephen O'Kennedy, Senior Data Engineer at ZeroNorth - Charting ZeroNorth's Voyage with Snowflake, Airflow, and DBT Core.

talks.description: Lunar's journey with dbt Core on AWS since 2019, including a recent large-scale model migration and CLI/dbt hacks used to ease it.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Working with dbt Core on the AWS stack by Mikael Hedegaard Thorup, Senior Analytics Engineer at Lunar
talks.title: Working with dbt Core on the AWS stack

talks.description: Mrs Wordsmith's game event data pipeline optimization experience using dbt documentation, with examples from a Unity game data migration.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Implementing dbt and developing collaborative workflows, a math nerd's perspective by Charles T. Grey, Data Scientist at Mrs Wordsmith
talks.title: Implementing dbt and developing collaborative workflows, a math nerd's perspective

talks.description: ZeroNorth's deployment of automated dbt pipelines at scale using open-source platforms including Snowflake and Airflow.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Charting ZeroNorth's Voyage with Snowflake, Airflow, and DBT Core: A Closer Look at Our Infrastructure by Stephen O'Kennedy, Senior Data Engineer at ZeroNorth
talks.title: Charting ZeroNorth's Voyage with Snowflake, Airflow, and DBT Core: A Closer Look at Our Infrastructure

events.agenda: Fifth edition covering CI and orchestration at group.one, schedule-less data architecture at Ageras with dynamic tables, and dbt Labs' philosophy of transformations via the Semantic Layer.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Oct 10, 2024 · 5:30 PM to 8:45 PM CEST

group.ONE, Kalvebod Brygge 24, Copenhagen

Copenhagen dbt Meetup vol. 5

Emil Nilsson, Director of Data at group.one - Deep Dives on CI and Orchestration @ group.one.

August Hörlën, Senior Analytics Engineer at Ageras - Schedule-less Data Architecture @ Ageras.

Erica Louie, Sr. Analytics Manager at dbt Labs & Andrew Escay, Lead Data Analyst at dbt Labs - Late-stage transformations: Utilizing dbt Semantic Layer metrics.

talks.description: group.one's experience building a data team in an M&A-driven organization, covering CI processes and dbt job orchestration.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Deep Dives on CI and Orchestration @ group.one by Emil Nilsson, Director of Data at group.one
talks.title: Deep Dives on CI and Orchestration @ group.one

talks.description: How Ageras transformed its data architecture using Snowflake dynamic tables and dbt, moving from traditional scheduling to a responsive, schedule-less pipeline.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Schedule-less Data Architecture @ Ageras by August Hörlën, Senior Analytics Engineer at Ageras
talks.title: Schedule-less Data Architecture @ Ageras

talks.description: An argument that the industry has solved building dbt transformation models but still faces friction with stakeholders, and that metrics via the dbt Semantic Layer are the next stage.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Late-stage transformations: Utilizing dbt Semantic Layer metrics by Erica Louie, Sr. Analytics Manager at dbt Labs & Andrew Escay, Lead Data Analyst at dbt Labs
talks.speaker_title: Sr. Analytics Manager & Lead Data Analyst, dbt Labs
talks.title: Late-stage transformations: Utilizing dbt Semantic Layer metrics

events.agenda: Sixth edition covering Pleo's dbt migration tools, opinionated ESG data product development at TDC Net, and building a semantic layer with dbt and Lightdash at Skatteguiden.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Mar 26, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:45 PM CET

Pleo HQ, Sortedam Dossering 7, Copenhagen

Copenhagen dbt Meetup vol. 6

Arın Tazeler, Pleo - Migrating dbt at Pleo: Handy tools & approaches.

Charles T. Gray, TDC Net - Opinionated ESG Data Product Development with dbt.

Kilian Tscherny, Skatteguiden - Building a strong semantic layer with dbt and Lightdash.

talks.description: How Pleo migrates dbt repositories, leveraging custom solutions in dbt Core for column-level lineage and self-built migration tools.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Migrating dbt at Pleo: Handy tools & approaches. Speaker: Arın Tazeler (Pleo)
talks.title: Migrating dbt at Pleo: Handy tools & approaches

talks.description: Scaling data governance at TDC Net using an opinionated, test-driven development strategy, with a deep dive into test definitions for ESG reporting.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Opinionated ESG Data Product Development with dbt. Speaker: Charles T. Gray (TDC Net)
talks.title: Opinionated ESG Data Product Development with dbt

talks.description: How Skatteguiden built a modern analytics stack with a strong semantic layer integrating dbt with Lightdash, scaling to 1 million users.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Building a strong semantic layer with dbt and Lightdash. Speaker: Kilian Tscherny (Skatteguiden)
talks.title: Building a strong semantic layer with dbt and Lightdash

additional_metadata.note: Part of the dbt Global Circuit Series.

events.agenda: Seventh edition, part of the dbt Global Circuit Series, covering metric trees and AI at Spotify (via Steep), accelerating data product delivery at LEO Pharma, and the new dbt Fusion engine.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.event_name: dbt Global Circuit Series: Copenhagen dbt Meetup vol. 7
events.raw_text:
Thu, Jun 12, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 9:00 PM CEST

Veo Technologies, Rovsingsgade 68, Copenhagen

dbt Global Circuit Series: Copenhagen dbt Meetup vol. 7

Johan Baltzar, Co-Founder & CEO at Steep - Metric Trees & AI – Spotify use case.

Nicola Barbieri, Principal Data Engineer at LEO Pharma and Korina Kuhar, Data Engineering Lead at LEO Pharma - Accelerating Data Products Delivery with dbt: LEO Pharma's Success Story.

Benoit Perigaud, Staff DX Advocate at dbt Labs - For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs.

talks.description: How to automatically analyze why metrics are moving using Steep and dbt, based on metric trees inspired by Spotify's approach.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Metric Trees & AI – Spotify use case. Speaker: Johan Baltzar (Co-Founder & CEO at Steep)
talks.title: Metric Trees & AI – Spotify use case

talks.description: How LEO Pharma revolutionized data transformation with a scalable design, using Terraform and dbt to accelerate data product delivery.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Accelerating Data Products Delivery with dbt: LEO Pharma's Success Story. Speaker: Nicola Barbieri (Principal Data Engineer at LEO Pharma) and Korina Kuhar (Data Engineering Lead at LEO Pharma)
talks.speaker_title: Principal Data Engineer & Data Engineering Lead, LEO Pharma
talks.title: Accelerating Data Products Delivery with dbt: LEO Pharma's Success Story

talks.description: An introduction to Fusion, the new dbt engine, covering its new capabilities and how to try it in existing projects.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs. Speaker: Benoit Perigaud (Staff DX Advocate at dbt Labs)
talks.title: For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs

events.agenda: Eighth edition covering refactoring dbt project structure at Keepit, building a scalable data mesh with dbt and Snowflake at Velux, and resilient embedded analytics pipelines at Qarma.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Nov 26, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:30 PM CET

Lunar, Bredgade 43, Copenhagen

Copenhagen dbt Meetup vol. 8

Olga Surkova, Senior Data Analyst at Keepit - Refactoring dbt the Hard Way: Lessons Learned While Rebuilding Our Project Structure.

Thomas Schrum Nicolet, Platform Engineer at Velux - Building a Scalable Data Mesh with dbt and Snowflake at Velux.

Martha Scheffler, Data Engineer at Qarma - Building Resilient Data Pipelines for Embedded Analytics.

talks.description: How Keepit approached a full-scale dbt project refactor, covering DAG restructuring, Jinja pattern improvements, and validation checks for long-term scalability.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Refactoring dbt the Hard Way: Lessons Learned While Rebuilding Our Project Structure. Speaker: Olga Surkova (Senior Data Analyst at Keepit)
talks.title: Refactoring dbt the Hard Way: Lessons Learned While Rebuilding Our Project Structure

talks.description: How Velux built a scalable data mesh using dbt as the single source of truth for data products in Snowflake, with custom macros to simplify workflows.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Building a Scalable Data Mesh with dbt and Snowflake at Velux. Speaker: Thomas Schrum Nicolet (Platform Engineer at Velux)
talks.title: Building a Scalable Data Mesh with dbt and Snowflake at Velux

talks.description: How Qarma built a resilient data platform using blue-green deployment strategies with Snowflake zero-copy clones and dbt macros, and orchestrating multiple dbt projects with Kestra.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Building Resilient Data Pipelines for Embedded Analytics. Speaker: Martha Scheffler (Data Engineer at Qarma)
talks.title: Building Resilient Data Pipelines for Embedded Analytics

additional_metadata.note: New format: two longer sessions instead of three shorter ones.

events.agenda: Ninth edition centered on AI agents in analytics engineering, covering a scalable Data Vault built for AI at Veo and agentic development with dbt Fusion and Databricks.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Wednesday, Mar 11 · 5:30 PM to 8:30 PM CET

Veo Technologies, Rovsingsgade 68, Copenhagen

Copenhagen dbt Meetup vol. 9

Building a dbt Data Vault That Scales With AI. Speaker: Frederik Juhl Pedersen (Senior Analytics Engineer at Veo).

Agentic development with dbt Fusion and Databricks. Speaker: Nina Anderson (Solution Engineer at dbt Labs).

talks.description: How Veo rebuilt its dbt platform as a 5-layer Data Vault with AutomateDV and strict naming conventions, enabling AI agents to generate production-ready models from specs.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Building a dbt Data Vault That Scales With AI. Speaker: Frederik Juhl Pedersen (Senior Analytics Engineer at Veo)
talks.title: Building a dbt Data Vault That Scales With AI

talks.description: Exploring agentic development with dbt Fusion, the dbt MCP server, and Databricks, showing how these technologies combine to build, test, and reason over analytics workflows autonomously.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Agentic development with dbt Fusion and Databricks. Speaker: Nina Anderson (Solution Engineer at dbt Labs)
talks.title: Agentic development with dbt Fusion and Databricks
